## Summary

Describe the contribution in 1-3 sentences.

## Type of contribution

- [ ] New resource page
- [ ] Update to an existing resource
- [ ] Artifact folder only
- [ ] Site content update
- [ ] Fix or cleanup

## Resource checklist

- [ ] Added or updated `artifacts/<slug>/metadata.yml`
- [ ] Added or updated `artifacts/<slug>/README.md`
- [ ] Added a preview image or example result
- [ ] Added or updated a public page in `resources/` if this is ready for publication
- [ ] Added the resource to `resources/index.qmd`
- [ ] Added paper or citation information if available
- [ ] Checked that links work

## Testing

- [ ] Ran `quarto render`
- [ ] Checked the relevant page locally

## Notes for review

Add anything reviewers should know here, including whether the resource is public, partially public, or still needs follow-up work.
